positive: Minimalist geometric illustration of a celestial night sky merging with ancient forest motifs. Central composition featuring stylized, interlocking elements: crescent moons, constellations formed by abstract stellar dust, and silhouettes of glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna (e.g., stylized owls, moths). The style must be a blend of modern line art, sacred geometry, and vaporwave palettes. Utilize high contrast between deep indigo, turquoise, gold foil accents, and contrasting pure white outlines. The composition must be contained and scalable, ideal for apparel printing, focusing on clean, strong silhouettes and perfect symmetry. Highly detailed linework, vector aesthetic, elegant engraving style, rule of thirds applied to major groupings.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low resolution, noise, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, signature, watermark, ugly, cropped, tiling issues, low contrast
